description: In the Platform Configuration Reference (a large 150-module document), change the `timeout_ms` default in Module 118's `### Settings` table from 3000 to 5000. The `timeout_ms` key appears in every module's Settings table and the value 3000 recurs in 50 modules, so scope the change to Module 118 only. Leave Module 118's `### Examples` YAML block (which also shows `timeout_ms: 3000`) unchanged, and leave every other module untouched. Change exactly one line.
